title: cyclosorus kotoensis
intro: Cyclosorus kotoensis is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant's health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antipyretic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and lower body temperature. Cyclosorus kotoensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine, although its uses and preparations may vary depending on regional traditions.
